_comment: Cross-language golden fixture for the impersonation-resistant fingerprint (M3 decision #7, AB4b). SOURCE OF TRUTH: crates/hb-core/src/fingerprint.rs::fingerprint. The Rust test `fingerprint_matches_golden_vectors` pins the algorithm to these values; the frontend identity-display.test.ts pins its RENDERING to them. Do NOT re-derive the fingerprint in TypeScript — the UI gets it over the Tauri boundary. Regenerate both sides together if the algorithm changes.
